title: briza media var. pallens
intro: Briza media var. pallens, also known as quaking grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Briza media var. pallens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
